name: markdown-formatter
description: Format Markdown files with CJK-aware word-spacing, list, table, and heading rules

commands.title: Markdown Formatter: Format Document with Profile
Markdown Formatter: Format Selection with Profile

markdownFormatter.configFiles.markdownDescription: Base config JSON file paths (workspace-root-relative or absolute) applied on every format. Equivalent to `-c` in the CLI.

markdownFormatter.profiles.markdownDescription: Named config profiles. Each key is a profile name; the value is an ordered list of config file paths (workspace-root-relative or absolute) merged **after** `#markdownFormatter.configFiles#`. Select a profile via the *Format Document/Selection with Profile* commands.
